title: Kashyyyk Royal Families
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:KashyyykCouncil.jpg|thumb|250px]]

The '''Kashyyyk Royal Families''' were princely [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] kindreds on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

Among the responsibilities of the Royal Families was deciding on the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] stance in time of war. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], at the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], their representatives accordingly met in the [[Kashyyyk Royal City/Legends|Kashyyyk Royal City]], in a council dominated by [[King/Legends|King]] [[Grakchawwaa/Legends|Grakchawwaa]].

It is unclear on current evidence what the exact constitutional structure of Kashyyyk at this time was: the council seemed to defer to Grakchawwaa's opinion, but there were evidently several Royal Families functioning as a collective decision-making group, and it is unclear what the exact reasons for Grakchawwaa's seniority were.

Initially, Grakchawwaa decided to maintain neutrality, but when news arrived that Separatist [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] had killed his [[Rikummee|son]], he angrily committed himself to war on the side of the Republic, and led his planet into the conflict.
